message:
fix(raptorq,plan): checked ESI arithmetic, duration hash truncation

- systematic.rs: use checked_add + try_from for repair ESI computation
  to prevent silent u32 overflow/truncation (MEDIUM)
- certificate.rs: use try_from with unwrap_or(MAX) for Duration::as_nanos()
  to u64, matching pattern used elsewhere in analysis.rs (LOW)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
